query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `api_usage` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `operation` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `credits` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `itemCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `context` varchar(256),
  `costUsd` decimal(10,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now())
);

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user s8wnVbZA4yzfrg7.8ebc791ac56d --database DZjTmaPHn9nCzaD9AuvmrW --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `api_usage` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `operation` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `credits` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `itemCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `context` varchar(256),
  `costUsd` decimal(10,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now())
);
